stemHtml: A pilot is on vacation and is enjoying a lot of alcohol during their holiday. The pilot plans to stop drinking on the last day in order to prepare for a return to work. However, the operator's Flight Ops Department call the pilot to roster him a day early at around 20:00. The pilot last drank alcohol around 12:00 on that same day. Can he still fly?

options.a: Yes, because his last drink was at least 8 hours ago.
options.c: Yes, the pilot can fly as long as he feels fit and not under the influence of alcohol, regardless of when he last drank.
options.d: Yes, the pilot can fly as long as he consumes non-alcoholic beverages before the flight to sober up.
